text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin has a short stride, but the rush she gets in the
homestretch is fierce. More than anything else, she longs to win.

A bit of searching reveals a video of a race she ran before applying to
Tracen.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

Her expression has no hint of impatience. She's running comfortably
in the back, calm and controlled.

She takes it slow. Usually, letting the frontrunners save their energy
for the final sprint would be a mistake.
But in one beautiful stroke, she flips those odds around.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Gaaaaagh!
With a burst of fearsome strength, she tears away from the pack.
She rages forward like a storm, and takes the win!
I scramble through Taishin's portfolio to check the times. Her speed in the first half isn't anything special, but the second half...
The last three furlongs are incredibly fast for this type of race!

She got impatient at the tryouts and wasted her energy early on, so
she didn't have enough to sustain her last spurt.
choice_data_list: (If she saves her stamina, she can do it!)

text_block_list.text:
It's early to be thinking strategy, but I can't help tracking Taishin
down.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're the trainer from yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You're the trainer who was with Taishin last night! Could this be
what I think it is?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You're here to scout her?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: The hell does that mean? I flipped out on you last night. Why would...

She looks at me perplexed, and I tell her about the race footage I
watched.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh huh... So?
choice_data_list: I want us to seize victory together!
I want us to seize victory together!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh no...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I-I'm, I'm... I'm sho touuuched!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Let's gooo! This trainer's got the stuff! Taishin, this one's speciaaal!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Please... You think everyone's special.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So?! Are you gonna accept?! Are you gonna team up?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wh-why would I pair up with this weirdo?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: A shame. All would have sailed smoothly if only you were on board.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wha?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to intrude. I have a pressing matter at hand, and I need your
assistance, Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Pre... President?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To cut straight to the point, I have received multiple reports that you
are unfit for Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The reasons are many: your recent lackluster results, concerns for your
wellbeing, and—however noble the intention—your repeated
disregard for curfew.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I presented counterarguments on your behalf, but as matters stand... I
must ask you to aid me yourself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: My... self?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes. You see, the concerns about you were voiced predominantly by
academy faculty.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The simplest way to convince them is to offer proof of your abilities.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Please, endeavor to dispel the accusations against you, Narita
Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
("Dispel the accusations," she says... How the hell am I supposed to
pull that off?)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: NOOOOO! We can't let them expel you, Taishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: T-Ticket, you... Don't tell me you were eavesdropping!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'd NEVER! I was just listening intently!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's exactly what eavesdropping is...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Indeed. But the situation is more dire than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide?! Not you too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm surrounded...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now, if we are to achieve what the president indicated, there is but
one path available.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, there's a way?! You're amazing, Hayahideee! Just say the word!
How can we help?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I really don't see why you're so worked up about this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If we are to inspire high expectations of your racing potential, it
follows that we must demonstrate it on the track.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We need to gather people for a scrimmage. The two of us will join as
well.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeeeah! That's perfect! Let's do this, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You think I need your pity? That I need you to throw a race just to get
a win?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Not for a second. Putting me aside, you should know well that there's
one racer here who doesn't know the meaning of holding back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well... I guess...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The reason we are trying to help is quite simple. Though that which is
simple is often difficult to put in words.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: So forget it. I look forward to seeing you at the scrimmage, Taishin.
